description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events with any tag. Run two parallel jobs, win64_msys2 on windows-latest and win32_msvc on windows-2019. For each job, extract the version number from the tag, check out the code, then configure, build, package, and release the project using cmake, cpack, and the release-action. The win64_msys2 job uses MSYS2 with a mingw64 environment and installs additional packages, while the win32_msvc job uses a Visual Studio 2017 environment.
